questions: how to start a book club
answers: Start a book club: gather 4-8 people, meet monthly, rotate who picks the book, prepare discussion questions.
Tips: set reading deadlines, keep discussions respectful, mix genres, and include food/drinks for social element.
Online book clubs: Goodreads groups, Discord servers, Reddit r/bookclub. No location limits, flexible scheduling.
Book club benefits: read more consistently, discover new genres, social connection, and deeper understanding through discussion.
